title: Inapplicability of free and voluntary rule to admissions not involving criminal intent
doc_html:
§454.  Inapplicability of free and voluntary rule to admissions not involving criminal intent

The rule that a confession produced by threat or promise is inadmissible in evidence does not apply to admissions not involving the existence of a criminal intent.
doc_text:
§454.  Inapplicability of free and voluntary rule to admissions not involving criminal intent
The rule that a confession produced by threat or promise is inadmissible in evidence does not apply to admissions not involving the existence of a criminal intent.
